Chen Yu йҷіиЈ•
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Yu (йҷіиЈ•). Son of Chen Zhi. Served Jin after Shu fell. Chen Yu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
